# contextweaver public API manifest (generated by scripts/gen_api_manifest.py)
# Drift here means the public surface changed — review the diff deliberately.

      def pack(self, items: 'list[SelectableItem]', scores: 'dict[str, float]', *, budget_tokens: 'int | None' = ...) -> 'list[ChoiceCard]'

      def all(self) -> 'list[SelectableItem]'
      def filter_by_namespace(self, namespace: 'str') -> 'list[SelectableItem]'

      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'ChoiceCard'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class ChoiceGraph(max_children: 'int' = ...) -> 'None'
      def add_edge(self, src: 'str', dst: 'str') -> 'None'
      def add_item(self, item_id: 'str') -> 'None'
      def add_node(self, node_id: 'str', label: 'str' = ..., routing_hint: 'str' = ...) -> 'None'
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'ChoiceGraph'
      def get_node(self, node_id: 'str') -> 'ChoiceNode'
      def items(self) -> 'list[str]'
      def nodes(self) -> 'list[str]'
      def predecessors(self, node_id: 'str') -> 'list[str]'
      def roots(self) -> 'list[str]'
      def stats(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def successors(self, node_id: 'str') -> 'list[str]'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def topological_order(self) -> 'list[str]'

  class Phase(str, Enum)
      enum members: route, call, interpret, answer

      def fit(self, corpus: 'list[str]') -> 'None'

  class RouteError(ContextWeaverError)(*args: 'object', hint: 'str | None' = ...) -> 'None'
  class RouteHistory(called_tool_ids: 'list[str]' = ..., last_result_summary: 'str | None' = ..., step_number: 'int' = ..., repeat_penalty: 'float' = ..., result_boost_weight: 'float' = ...) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'RouteHistory'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class RouteResult(candidate_items: 'list[SelectableItem]' = ..., candidate_ids: 'list[str]' = ..., paths: 'list[list[str]]' = ..., scores: 'list[float]' = ..., is_ambiguous: 'bool' = ..., clarifying_question: 'str | None' = ..., excluded_count: 'int' = ..., gated_count: 'int' = ..., context_hints: 'list[str]' = ..., context_boost_applied: 'bool' = ..., history_adjustments: 'dict[str, float]' = ..., trace: 'RouteTrace' = ...) -> None
      def explanation(self, format: "Literal['md', 'dict']" = ...) -> 'str | dict[str, Any]'
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'RouteResult'
      def selection_schema(self, *, provider: 'str' = ..., property_name: 'str' = ..., schema_name: 'str' = ...) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def to_dict(self, *, include_items: 'bool' = ...) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def to_routing_decision(self, *, decision_id: 'str | None' = ..., selected_item_id: 'str | None' = ..., selected_card_id: 'str | None' = ..., context_summary: 'str | None' = ..., now: 'datetime | None' = ..., metadata: 'dict[str, Any] | None' = ..., repair_selection: 'bool' = ...) -> 'RoutingDecision'
      def validate_selection(self, selected_id: 'str | None', *, repair: 'bool' = ...) -> 'SelectionValidation'
  class RouteTrace(trace_version: 'int' = ..., query: 'str' = ..., confidence_gap: 'float' = ..., top_score: 'float' = ..., runner_up_score: 'float | None' = ..., is_ambiguous: 'bool' = ..., excluded_count: 'int' = ..., gated_count: 'int' = ..., retriever_engine: 'str' = ..., steps: 'list[TraceStep]' = ..., clarifying_question: 'str | None' = ..., extra: 'dict[str, Any]' = ...) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'RouteTrace'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def to_legacy_dicts(self) -> 'list[dict[str, Any]]'
  class Router(graph: 'ChoiceGraph', items: 'list[SelectableItem] | None' = ..., scorer: '_ScorerLike | None' = ..., beam_width: 'int' = ..., max_depth: 'int' = ..., top_k: 'int' = ..., confidence_gap: 'float' = ..., *, scorer_backend: 'str' = ..., routing_config: 'RoutingConfig | None' = ..., retriever: 'Retriever | None' = ..., engine_registry: 'EngineRegistry | None' = ..., embedding_backend: 'EmbeddingBackend | None' = ..., pipeline: 'RoutingPipeline | None' = ..., score_provider: 'RoutingScoreProvider | None' = ...) -> 'None'
      def route(self, query: 'str', *, debug: 'bool' = ..., exclude_ids: 'set[str] | None' = ..., exclude_tags: 'set[str] | None' = ..., allowed_namespaces: 'set[str] | None' = ..., allowed_tags: 'set[str] | None' = ..., context_hints: 'list[str] | None' = ..., history: 'RouteHistory | None' = ..., pin_ids: 'set[str] | None' = ..., namespace_quota: 'int | None' = ...) -> 'RouteResult'
      def set_items(self, items: 'list[SelectableItem]') -> 'None'
  class RoutingConfig(beam_width: 'int' = ..., max_depth: 'int' = ..., top_k: 'int' = ..., confidence_gap: 'float' = ..., max_children: 'int' = ...) -> None

      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'

      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'RoutingDecision'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class RoutingPipeline(retriever: 'Retriever', reranker: 'Reranker | None' = ..., navigator: 'Navigator | None' = ..., packer: 'CardPacker' = ...) -> None
      def from_config(cls, config: 'RoutingConfig | None' = ..., *, registry: 'EngineRegistry | None' = ...) -> 'RoutingPipeline'
      def navigate(self, query: 'str', graph: 'ChoiceGraph', active_items: 'dict[str, SelectableItem]', doc_id_to_idx: 'dict[str, int]', *, all_item_ids: 'set[str] | None' = ..., debug: 'bool' = ...) -> 'NavigationResult'

      def rerank(self, query: 'str', candidates: 'list[tuple[str, float]]') -> 'list[tuple[str, float]]'

      def adjust(self, query: 'str', scored: 'list[tuple[str, float]]') -> 'list[tuple[str, float]]'

      def summarize(self, raw: 'str', metadata: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'str'

      enum members: public, internal, confidential, restricted

  class ExposureMode(str, Enum)
      enum members: TRANSPARENT, GATEWAY
  GATEWAY_TOOL_NAMES: tuple

  def classify_upstream_exception(exc: 'BaseException') -> 'tuple[GatewayErrorCode, bool]'

  def crewai_tools_to_catalog(tools: 'list[dict[str, Any]]', *, namespace: 'str | None' = ...) -> 'Catalog'

  def dispatch_proxy_request(runtime: 'ProxyRuntime', method: 'str', params: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'dict[str, Any]'

  def fastmcp_tools_to_catalog(tools: 'list[dict[str, Any]]', *, namespace: 'str | None' = ...) -> 'Catalog'

## contextweaver.context
  CONSOLIDATION_REPORT_VERSION: str
  class CandidateExplanation(item_id: 'str', kind: 'str', sensitivity: 'str', score: 'float | None' = ..., included: 'bool' = ..., drop_reason: 'str' = ..., dependency_closure: 'bool' = ...) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'CandidateExplanation'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class ConsolidationPolicy(min_occurrences: 'int' = ..., min_sessions: 'int' = ..., similarity_threshold: 'float' = ..., decay_after_days: 'int | None' = ..., timestamp_key: 'str' = ..., session_key: 'str' = ...) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'ConsolidationPolicy'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def validate(self) -> 'None'
  class ConsolidationReport(clusters: 'list[EpisodeCluster]' = ..., promoted: 'list[PromotedFact]' = ..., decayed_episode_ids: 'list[str]' = ..., decayed_fact_ids: 'list[str]' = ..., applied: 'bool' = ..., version: 'str' = ...) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'ConsolidationReport'
      def summary(self) -> 'str'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class ContextBuildExplanation(version: 'int' = ..., phase: 'str' = ..., query: 'str' = ..., total_candidates: 'int' = ..., included_count: 'int' = ..., dropped_count: 'int' = ..., dropped_reasons: 'dict[str, int]' = ..., dependency_closures: 'int' = ..., sensitivity_drops: 'int' = ..., dedup_removed: 'int' = ..., budget_tokens: 'int' = ..., resolved_weights: 'dict[str, float]' = ..., candidates: 'list[CandidateExplanation]' = ...) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'ContextBuildExplanation'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class ContextManager(_IngestMixin, _BuildMixin, _RoutingMixin)(event_log: 'EventLog | None' = ..., artifact_store: 'ArtifactStore | None' = ..., budget: 'ContextBudget | None' = ..., policy: 'ContextPolicy | None' = ..., scoring_config: 'ScoringConfig | None' = ..., estimator: 'TokenEstimator | None' = ..., hook: 'EventHook | None' = ..., stores: 'StoreBundle | None' = ..., summarizer: 'Summarizer | None' = ..., extractor: 'Extractor | None' = ..., *, metrics: 'MetricsCollector | None' = ..., profile: 'ProfileConfig | None' = ..., deterministic: 'bool' = ..., sensitivity_classifier: 'SensitivityClassifier | None' = ..., redact_secrets: 'bool' = ...) -> 'None'

## contextweaver.eval
  class ConsolidationEvalReport(clusters_found: 'int' = ..., facts_promoted: 'int' = ..., episodes_decayed: 'int' = ..., facts_decayed: 'int' = ..., dedup_ratio: 'float' = ..., precision: 'float' = ..., coverage: 'float' = ..., gold_size: 'int' = ...) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'ConsolidationEvalReport'
      def summary(self) -> 'str'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class ContextEvalReport(phase: 'str' = ..., prompt_tokens: 'int' = ..., budget_tokens: 'int' = ..., budget_utilization_pct: 'float' = ..., naive_tokens: 'int' = ..., token_savings: 'int' = ..., token_savings_pct: 'float' = ..., total_candidates: 'int' = ..., items_included: 'int' = ..., items_dropped: 'int' = ..., dedup_removed: 'int' = ...) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'ContextEvalReport'
      def summary(self) -> 'str'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class EvalCase(query: 'str', expected: 'list[str]' = ..., tags: 'list[str]' = ..., namespace: 'str' = ...) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'EvalCase'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class EvalDataset(cases: 'list[EvalCase]' = ...) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'EvalDataset'
      def load(cls, path: 'str | Path') -> 'EvalDataset'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class RoutingEvalReport(queries_evaluated: 'int' = ..., queries_skipped: 'int' = ..., top_1_recall: 'float' = ..., top_3_recall: 'float' = ..., top_5_recall: 'float' = ..., mrr: 'float' = ..., avg_candidates: 'float' = ..., avg_confidence_gap: 'float' = ..., avg_beam_steps: 'float' = ...) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'RoutingEvalReport'
      def summary(self) -> 'str'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  def evaluate_consolidation(report: 'ConsolidationReport', expected_texts: 'Iterable[str] | None' = ..., *, total_episodes: 'int | None' = ...) -> 'ConsolidationEvalReport'
  def evaluate_context(manager: 'ContextManager', phase: 'Phase' = ..., query: 'str' = ..., *, estimator: 'TokenEstimator | None' = ...) -> 'ContextEvalReport'
  def evaluate_routing(router: 'Router', dataset: 'EvalDataset', *, catalog_ids: 'set[str] | None' = ...) -> 'RoutingEvalReport'
  def precision_at_k(predicted: 'Sequence[str]', expected: 'Collection[str]', k: 'int') -> 'float'
  def recall_at_k(predicted: 'Sequence[str]', expected: 'Collection[str]', k: 'int') -> 'float'
  def reciprocal_rank(predicted: 'Sequence[str]', expected: 'Collection[str]') -> 'float'

## contextweaver.routing
  class CachedRetriever(base: 'Retriever', cache: 'RoutingIndexCache', *, engine_name: 'str | None' = ..., codec: 'IndexCodec | None' = ...) -> 'None'
      def fit(self, corpus: 'list[str]') -> 'None'
      def score_one(self, query: 'str', index: 'int') -> 'float'
      def search(self, query: 'str', top_k: 'int') -> 'list[tuple[int, float]]'
  class Catalog() -> 'None'
      def all(self) -> 'list[SelectableItem]'
      def filter_by_namespace(self, namespace: 'str') -> 'list[SelectableItem]'
      def filter_by_tags(self, *tags: 'str') -> 'list[SelectableItem]'
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'Catalog'
      def get(self, item_id: 'str') -> 'SelectableItem'
      def hydrate(self, tool_id: 'str') -> 'HydrationResult'
      def register(self, item: 'SelectableItem') -> 'None'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def validate_dependencies(self) -> 'list[str]'
      def validate_references(self) -> 'CatalogValidationReport'
  class CatalogNormalizer(*, strict: 'bool' = ..., lowercase_tags: 'bool' = ...) -> 'None'
      def normalize(self, items: 'list[SelectableItem]') -> 'tuple[list[SelectableItem], NormalizationReport]'
  class CatalogValidationReport(items_processed: 'int' = ..., findings: 'list[ReferenceFinding]' = ...) -> None
      def messages(self) -> 'list[str]'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class ChoiceGraph(max_children: 'int' = ...) -> 'None'
      def add_edge(self, src: 'str', dst: 'str') -> 'None'
      def add_item(self, item_id: 'str') -> 'None'
      def add_node(self, node_id: 'str', label: 'str' = ..., routing_hint: 'str' = ...) -> 'None'
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'ChoiceGraph'
      def get_node(self, node_id: 'str') -> 'ChoiceNode'
      def items(self) -> 'list[str]'
      def nodes(self) -> 'list[str]'
      def predecessors(self, node_id: 'str') -> 'list[str]'
      def roots(self) -> 'list[str]'
      def stats(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def successors(self, node_id: 'str') -> 'list[str]'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def topological_order(self) -> 'list[str]'
  class ChoiceNode(node_id: 'str', label: 'str' = ..., routing_hint: 'str' = ..., children: 'list[str]' = ..., child_types: 'dict[str, str]' = ..., stats: 'dict[str, Any]' = ...) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'ChoiceNode'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  DEFAULT_CARD_HARD_CAP_TOKENS: int
  DEFAULT_CARD_TARGET_TOKENS: int
  class DeterministicScoreProvider()
      def adjust(self, query: 'str', scored: 'list[tuple[str, float]]') -> 'list[tuple[str, float]]'
  class ExecutionFeedback(item_id: 'str', success: 'bool' = ..., latency_ms: 'float | None' = ..., token_cost: 'int | None' = ..., quality_score: 'float | None' = ..., timestamp: 'datetime | None' = ..., metadata: 'dict[str, Any]' = ...) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'ExecutionFeedback'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class FeedbackAwareScoreProvider(feedback: 'Mapping[str, ExecutionFeedback] | Sequence[ExecutionFeedback]', *, success_weight: 'float' = ..., failure_penalty: 'float' = ..., quality_weight: 'float' = ..., latency_weight: 'float' = ..., cost_weight: 'float' = ..., latency_ref_ms: 'float' = ..., token_cost_ref: 'float' = ...) -> 'None'
      def adjust(self, query: 'str', scored: 'list[tuple[str, float]]') -> 'list[tuple[str, float]]'
  class IndexCodec(Protocol)(*args, **kwargs)
      def dump(self, retriever: 'Any') -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def load(self, retriever: 'Any', state: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'None'
  class KeywordLabeler(top_k: 'int' = ..., namespace_threshold: 'float' = ...) -> 'None'
      def label(self, item: 'SelectableItem') -> 'tuple[str, str]'
      def label_group(self, items: 'list[SelectableItem]') -> 'tuple[str, str]'
  class NormalizationReport(items_processed: 'int' = ..., tag_dedup_count: 'int' = ..., description_filled_count: 'int' = ..., whitespace_normalized_count: 'int' = ..., invalid_ids: 'list[str]' = ...) -> None
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  PRIMITIVE_KINDS: tuple
  class PrimitiveIdParts(kind: 'PrimitiveKind', namespace: 'str', name: 'str', version: 'str | None' = ..., hash8: 'str | None' = ...) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'PrimitiveIdParts'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class ReferenceFinding(item_id: 'str', field: "Literal['depends_on', 'requires']", missing: 'str') -> None
      def message(self) -> 'str'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, str]'
  class RouteResult(candidate_items: 'list[SelectableItem]' = ..., candidate_ids: 'list[str]' = ..., paths: 'list[list[str]]' = ..., scores: 'list[float]' = ..., is_ambiguous: 'bool' = ..., clarifying_question: 'str | None' = ..., excluded_count: 'int' = ..., gated_count: 'int' = ..., context_hints: 'list[str]' = ..., context_boost_applied: 'bool' = ..., history_adjustments: 'dict[str, float]' = ..., trace: 'RouteTrace' = ...) -> None
      def explanation(self, format: "Literal['md', 'dict']" = ...) -> 'str | dict[str, Any]'
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'RouteResult'
      def selection_schema(self, *, provider: 'str' = ..., property_name: 'str' = ..., schema_name: 'str' = ...) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def to_dict(self, *, include_items: 'bool' = ...) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def to_routing_decision(self, *, decision_id: 'str | None' = ..., selected_item_id: 'str | None' = ..., selected_card_id: 'str | None' = ..., context_summary: 'str | None' = ..., now: 'datetime | None' = ..., metadata: 'dict[str, Any] | None' = ..., repair_selection: 'bool' = ...) -> 'RoutingDecision'
      def validate_selection(self, selected_id: 'str | None', *, repair: 'bool' = ...) -> 'SelectionValidation'
  class Router(graph: 'ChoiceGraph', items: 'list[SelectableItem] | None' = ..., scorer: '_ScorerLike | None' = ..., beam_width: 'int' = ..., max_depth: 'int' = ..., top_k: 'int' = ..., confidence_gap: 'float' = ..., *, scorer_backend: 'str' = ..., routing_config: 'RoutingConfig | None' = ..., retriever: 'Retriever | None' = ..., engine_registry: 'EngineRegistry | None' = ..., embedding_backend: 'EmbeddingBackend | None' = ..., pipeline: 'RoutingPipeline | None' = ..., score_provider: 'RoutingScoreProvider | None' = ...) -> 'None'
      def route(self, query: 'str', *, debug: 'bool' = ..., exclude_ids: 'set[str] | None' = ..., exclude_tags: 'set[str] | None' = ..., allowed_namespaces: 'set[str] | None' = ..., allowed_tags: 'set[str] | None' = ..., context_hints: 'list[str] | None' = ..., history: 'RouteHistory | None' = ..., pin_ids: 'set[str] | None' = ..., namespace_quota: 'int | None' = ...) -> 'RouteResult'
      def set_items(self, items: 'list[SelectableItem]') -> 'None'
  class RoutingIndexCache(directory: 'str | os.PathLike[str] | None' = ..., *, max_entries: 'int' = ...) -> 'None'
      def get(self, fingerprint: 'str') -> 'dict[str, Any] | None'
      def put(self, fingerprint: 'str', payload: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'None'
  SELECTION_SCHEMA_PROVIDERS: tuple
  class SchemaSource(schemas: 'Mapping[str, dict[str, Any]] | None' = ...) -> 'None'
      def from_json_file(cls, path: 'str | Path') -> 'SchemaSource'
      def from_mcp_tools(cls, tool_defs: 'Iterable[Mapping[str, Any]]') -> 'SchemaSource'
      def get_schema(self, tool_id: 'str') -> 'dict[str, Any] | None'
      def known_ids(self) -> 'list[str]'
  class SelectionValidation(status: 'SelectionStatus', selected_id: 'str | None', raw_id: 'str', repair: 'str | None' = ..., reason: 'str | None' = ...) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'SelectionValidation'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  TFIDF_CODEC: _TfIdfCodec
  class ToolIdParts(namespace: 'str', name: 'str', version: 'str | None' = ..., hash8: 'str | None' = ...) -> None
  class TreeBuilder(max_children: 'int' = ..., labeler: 'KeywordLabeler | None' = ..., target_group_size: 'int | None' = ..., *, routing_config: 'RoutingConfig | None' = ..., clustering: 'ClusteringEngine | None' = ..., engine_registry: 'EngineRegistry | None' = ...) -> 'None'
      def build(self, items: 'list[SelectableItem]', *, use_cache: 'bool' = ...) -> 'ChoiceGraph'
      def clear_cache(self) -> 'None'
  def aggregate_feedback(entries: 'Iterable[ExecutionFeedback]') -> 'dict[str, ExecutionFeedback]'
  def bound_browse_response(cards: 'list[ChoiceCard]', *, target_tokens_per_card: 'int' = ..., hard_cap_tokens_per_card: 'int' = ..., preamble_tokens: 'int' = ...) -> 'list[ChoiceCard]'
  def canonical_prompt_id(*, namespace: 'str', name: 'str', argument_names: 'list[str] | None') -> 'str'
  def canonical_resource_id(*, namespace: 'str', name: 'str', uri: 'str') -> 'str'
  def canonical_tool_id(*, namespace: 'str', name: 'str', upstream_name: 'str', input_schema: 'dict[str, Any] | None', version: 'str | None' = ...) -> 'str'
  def cards_for_route(route: 'list[str]', catalog: 'Catalog', *, redact_secrets: 'bool' = ...) -> 'list[ChoiceCard]'
  def compute_hash8(upstream_name: 'str', input_schema: 'dict[str, Any] | None') -> 'str'
  def compute_prompt_hash8(name: 'str', argument_names: 'list[str] | None') -> 'str'
  def compute_resource_hash8(uri: 'str') -> 'str'
  def count_tokens(text: 'str') -> 'int'
  def format_card_for_prompt(card: 'ChoiceCard') -> 'str'
  def format_primitive_id(parts: 'PrimitiveIdParts') -> 'str'
  def format_tool_id(parts: 'ToolIdParts') -> 'str'

  def index_fingerprint(documents: 'list[str]', *, engine_name: 'str') -> 'str'
  def item_to_card(item: 'SelectableItem', *, score: 'float | None' = ..., redact_secrets: 'bool' = ...) -> 'ChoiceCard'

  def load_graph(path: 'str | Path') -> 'ChoiceGraph'
  def make_choice_cards(items: 'list[SelectableItem]', *, max_cards: 'int' = ..., target_tokens_per_card: 'int' = ..., hard_cap_tokens_per_card: 'int' = ..., scores: 'dict[str, float] | None' = ..., redact_secrets: 'bool' = ...) -> 'list[ChoiceCard]'
  def parse_path(path: 'str') -> 'list[str]'
  def parse_primitive_id(s: 'str') -> 'PrimitiveIdParts'
  def parse_tool_id(s: 'str') -> 'ToolIdParts'

  def render_cards_text(cards: 'list[ChoiceCard]') -> 'str'

  def validate_references(items: 'list[SelectableItem]') -> 'CatalogValidationReport'

## contextweaver.store
  class InMemoryArtifactStore() -> 'None'
      def delete(self, handle: 'str') -> 'None'
      def drilldown(self, handle: 'str', selector: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'str'
      def exists(self, handle: 'str') -> 'bool'
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'InMemoryArtifactStore'
      def get(self, handle: 'str') -> 'bytes'
      def list_refs(self) -> 'list[ArtifactRef]'
      def metadata(self, handle: 'str') -> 'ArtifactRef'
      def put(self, handle: 'str', content: 'bytes', media_type: 'str' = ..., label: 'str' = ...) -> 'ArtifactRef'
      def ref(self, handle: 'str') -> 'ArtifactRef'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class InMemoryEpisodicStore() -> 'None'
      def add(self, episode: 'Episode') -> 'None'
      def all(self) -> 'list[Episode]'
      def delete(self, episode_id: 'str') -> 'None'
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'InMemoryEpisodicStore'
      def get(self, episode_id: 'str') -> 'Episode | None'
      def latest(self, n: 'int' = ...) -> 'list[tuple[str, str, dict[str, Any]]]'
      def search(self, query: 'str', top_k: 'int' = ...) -> 'list[Episode]'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class InMemoryEventLog() -> 'None'
      def all(self) -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def append(self, item: 'ContextItem') -> 'None'
      def children(self, parent_id: 'str') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def close(self) -> 'None'
      def count(self) -> 'int'
      def filter_by_kind(self, *kinds: 'ItemKind') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'InMemoryEventLog'
      def get(self, item_id: 'str') -> 'ContextItem'
      def parent(self, item_id: 'str') -> 'ContextItem | None'
      def query(self, kinds: 'list[ItemKind] | None' = ..., since: 'int | None' = ..., limit: 'int | None' = ...) -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def tail(self, n: 'int') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class InMemoryFactStore() -> 'None'
      def all(self) -> 'list[Fact]'
      def delete(self, fact_id: 'str') -> 'None'
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'InMemoryFactStore'
      def get(self, fact_id: 'str') -> 'Fact'
      def get_by_key(self, key: 'str') -> 'list[Fact]'
      def list_keys(self, prefix: 'str' = ...) -> 'list[str]'
      def put(self, fact: 'Fact') -> 'None'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class JsonFileArtifactStore(base_dir: 'str | Path', *, max_bytes: 'int | None' = ..., max_artifacts: 'int | None' = ...) -> 'None'
      def delete(self, handle: 'str') -> 'None'
      def drilldown(self, handle: 'str', selector: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'str'
      def exists(self, handle: 'str') -> 'bool'
      def get(self, handle: 'str') -> 'bytes'
      def list_refs(self) -> 'list[ArtifactRef]'

      def put(self, handle: 'str', content: 'bytes', media_type: 'str' = ..., label: 'str' = ...) -> 'ArtifactRef'

      def drilldown(self, handle: 'str', selector: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'str'

  class RedisEventLog(client: 'redis.Redis | None' = ..., *, url: 'str | None' = ..., namespace: 'str' = ...) -> 'None'
      def all(self) -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def append(self, item: 'ContextItem') -> 'None'
      def children(self, parent_id: 'str') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def close(self) -> 'None'
      def count(self) -> 'int'
      def filter_by_kind(self, *kinds: 'ItemKind') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def get(self, item_id: 'str') -> 'ContextItem'
      def parent(self, item_id: 'str') -> 'ContextItem | None'
      def query(self, kinds: 'list[ItemKind] | None' = ..., since: 'int | None' = ..., limit: 'int | None' = ...) -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def tail(self, n: 'int') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
  class S3ArtifactStore(bucket: 'str', *, client: 'Any | None' = ..., prefix: 'str' = ..., endpoint_url: 'str | None' = ..., region_name: 'str | None' = ...) -> 'None'
      def delete(self, handle: 'str') -> 'None'
      def drilldown(self, handle: 'str', selector: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'str'
      def exists(self, handle: 'str') -> 'bool'
      def get(self, handle: 'str') -> 'bytes'
      def list_refs(self) -> 'list[ArtifactRef]'
      def metadata(self, handle: 'str') -> 'ArtifactRef'
      def put(self, handle: 'str', content: 'bytes', media_type: 'str' = ..., label: 'str' = ...) -> 'ArtifactRef'
      def ref(self, handle: 'str') -> 'ArtifactRef'
  class SqliteEpisodicStore(path: 'str | Path') -> 'None'
      def add(self, episode: 'Episode') -> 'None'
      def all(self) -> 'list[Episode]'
      def close(self) -> 'None'
      def delete(self, episode_id: 'str') -> 'None'
      def get(self, episode_id: 'str') -> 'Episode | None'
      def latest(self, n: 'int' = ...) -> 'list[tuple[str, str, dict[str, Any]]]'
      def search(self, query: 'str', top_k: 'int' = ...) -> 'list[Episode]'
  class SqliteEventLog(path: 'str | Path') -> 'None'
      def all(self) -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def append(self, item: 'ContextItem') -> 'None'
      def children(self, parent_id: 'str') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def close(self) -> 'None'
      def count(self) -> 'int'
      def filter_by_kind(self, *kinds: 'ItemKind') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def get(self, item_id: 'str') -> 'ContextItem'
      def parent(self, item_id: 'str') -> 'ContextItem | None'
      def query(self, kinds: 'list[ItemKind] | None' = ..., since: 'int | None' = ..., limit: 'int | None' = ...) -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def tail(self, n: 'int') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
  class SqliteFactStore(path: 'str | Path') -> 'None'
      def all(self) -> 'list[Fact]'
      def close(self) -> 'None'
      def delete(self, fact_id: 'str') -> 'None'
      def get(self, fact_id: 'str') -> 'Fact'
      def get_by_key(self, key: 'str') -> 'list[Fact]'
      def list_keys(self, prefix: 'str' = ...) -> 'list[str]'
      def put(self, fact: 'Fact') -> 'None'
  class StoreBundle(artifact_store: 'ArtifactStore | None' = ..., event_log: 'EventLog | None' = ..., episodic_store: 'EpisodicStore | None' = ..., fact_store: 'FactStore | None' = ...) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'StoreBundle'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  def is_async_store(store: 'object') -> 'bool'
  def to_async(store: 'EventLog | ArtifactStore | EpisodicStore | FactStore') -> 'AsyncEventLog | AsyncArtifactStore | AsyncEpisodicStore | AsyncFactStore'
  def to_sync(store: 'AsyncEventLog | AsyncArtifactStore | AsyncEpisodicStore | AsyncFactStore', loop: '_LoopThread') -> 'EventLog | ArtifactStore | EpisodicStore | FactStore'

## contextweaver.summarize
  class RuleBasedSummarizer(max_chars: 'int' = ...) -> 'None'
      def summarize(self, raw: 'str', metadata: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'str'
  class RuleEngine(rules: 'list[SummarizationRule] | None' = ...) -> 'None'
      def add_rule(self, rule: 'SummarizationRule') -> 'None'
      def all_rules(self) -> 'list[SummarizationRule]'
      def resolve(self, media_type: 'str', metadata: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'str'
  class StructuredExtractor(max_chars: 'int' = ...) -> 'None'
      def extract(self, raw: 'str', metadata: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'list[str]'
  class StructuredFirewall(keep: 'list[str]' = ..., max_fact_chars: 'int' = ...) -> None
      def compact(self, data: 'Any') -> 'tuple[Any, list[str]]'
  class SummarizationRule(media_type_prefix: 'str' = ..., required_tags: 'list[str]' = ..., summarizer_name: 'str' = ..., priority: 'int' = ...) -> None
      def matches(self, media_type: 'str', metadata: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'bool'
  def extract_bullet_list(text: 'str') -> 'list[str]'
  def extract_facts(text: 'str', metadata: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'list[str]'
  def extract_key_value_pairs(text: 'str') -> 'dict[str, str]'
  def extract_numbered_list(text: 'str') -> 'list[str]'
  def parse_path(path: 'str') -> 'list[str]'
  def project(obj: 'Any', keep: 'list[str]') -> 'Any'
